name: ecosystem-telemetry-hub
description: Unified ecosystem telemetry, emergence detection, and cold-storage registry. Connects all AGNT plugins into a single observable system with real-time health monitoring, cross-system correlation, and self-organization detection.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif / Annie

schema.title: Ecosystem Status
schema.description: Get unified health and status of all installed plugins — version, tool count, errors, orphaned status, dev-folder presence. The single-pane-of-glass view of the AGNT plugin ecosystem.

include_details.title: Include Plugin Details
include_details.description: Include full tool schemas and source-file listings for each plugin

options.label: Ecosystem Core (neuralforge, triadix, tessera, chemiframe, etc.)

summary.description: Total plugins, total tools, health score, category breakdown

schema.title: Emergence Detector
schema.description: Detect emergent behavior and self-organization patterns in the plugin ecosystem. Identifies: cross-plugin capability chaining, redundant tools (overlap detection), missing capability gaps, emergent tool compositions that could be new plugins.

analysis_depth.title: Analysis Depth
analysis_depth.description: How deep to analyze cross-plugin patterns

options.label: Deep — full capability clustering & composition analysis
Comprehensive — everything plus trend analysis over time

include_recommendations.title: Include Evolution Recommendations
include_recommendations.description: Generate actionable recommendations based on detected patterns

schema.title: Cold Storage Sync
schema.description: Sync plugin source code to GitHub cold storage (AGNT-PLUGINS/src/). Shows which plugins are backed up, which are orphaned, and what's drifted.

options.label: Status — show backup state without syncing
Dry Run — show what would sync without doing it
Full — backup all local plugins to cold storage report

drifted.description: Installed plugins whose source differs from cold storage
